title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Motors

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Tata Motors
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!
